title: Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees
Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees are standing committees that provide on-going medical/technical/scientific advice and recommendations on regulatory issues for drugs and medical devices in specific therapeutic areas or classes. Committee members are chosen through a formal nomination process involving a wide range of stakeholders.
If you are interested in being considered as a committee member please visit the Enhanced Review Capacity Initiative section of our web site for information on how to become part of the Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate's (PDD's) Scientific Experts Inventory and Database.
Only our current active committees are included on this site. For materials from past meetings of active committees and committees that are dormant, or whose mandate is completed, please click the following link for a complete list of previous Scientific Advisory Committees . Please contact Policy Bureau Enquires for additional information.
